004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
027
028/**
029 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link Json5Parser}.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Extends {@link JsonParserSession} to support JSON5 syntax including unquoted attribute names,
033 * single-quoted strings, string concatenation, JavaScript comments, and relaxed number formats.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
036 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
037 * </ul>
038 *
039 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
040 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JsonBasics">JSON Basics</a>
041 * </ul>
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "java:S125",  // State-machine comments are documentation, not commented-out code
045   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
046   "java:S135",  // Multiple break statements necessary for state machine error handling
047   "java:S110",  // Inheritance depth is intentional to reuse parser-session behavior layers
048   "resource" // ParserReader is managed by caller
049})
050public class Json5ParserSession extends JsonParserSession {
051
052   private static final AsciiSet VALID_BARE_CHARS = AsciiSet.create().range('A', 'Z').range('a', 'z').range('0', '9').chars("$_-.").build();
053
054   /**
055    * Builder class.
056    */
057   @SuppressWarnings({
058      "java:S110" // Inheritance depth is intentional across parser session builders
059   })
060   public static class Builder extends JsonParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
061
062      /**
063       * Constructor
064       *
065       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
066       */
067      protected Builder(Json5Parser ctx) {
068         super(ctx);
069      }
070
071      @Override
072      public Json5ParserSession build() {
073         return new Json5ParserSession(this);
074      }
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * Creates a new builder for this object.
079    *
080    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
081    * @return A new builder.
082    */
083   public static Builder create(Json5Parser ctx) {
084      return new Builder(ctx);
085   }
086
087   /**
088    * Constructor.
089    *
090    * @param builder The builder for this object.
091    */
092   protected Json5ParserSession(Builder builder) {
093      super(builder);
094   }
095
096   /**
097    * Opens a low-level pull-parser cursor over a JSON5 document, bound to this live session.
098    *
099    * <p>
100    * Same honored/ignored builder properties as {@link JsonParserSession#parseTokens(Object)};
101    * the JSON5 dialect relaxations (single-quoted strings, bare identifiers, trailing commas,
102    * missing values) are applied unconditionally as part of the format.
103    *
104    * @param input The input.  Accepts {@link Reader}, {@link CharSequence}, {@link InputStream},
105    *    <code><jk>byte</jk>[]</code>, or {@link File}.
106    * @return A new {@link Json5TokenReader}.
107    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
108    */
109   @SuppressWarnings({
110      "java:S2095" // ParserPipe lifecycle is transferred to the returned Json5TokenReader, which closes it via its own close(); the caller owns the cursor via try-with-resources.
111   })
112   @Override /* JsonParserSession */
113   public TokenReader parseTokens(Object input) throws IOException {
114      var pipe = new ParserPipe(
115         input,
116         isDebug(),
117         false /* strict */,
118         isAutoCloseStreams(),
119         isUnbuffered(),
120         getStreamCharset(),
121         getFileCharset());
122      return new Json5TokenReader(pipe, new JsonTokenReader.Settings(isTrimStrings()), this);
123   }
124
125   @Override
126   protected String parseFieldName(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
127      int c = r.peek();
128      if (c == '\'' || c == '"')
129         return parseString(r);
130      if (! VALID_BARE_CHARS.contains(c))
131         throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find the start of the field name.");
132      r.mark();
133      while (c != -1) {
134         c = r.read();
135         if (! VALID_BARE_CHARS.contains(c)) {
136            r.unread();
137            var s = r.getMarked().intern();
138            return s.equals("null") ? null : s;
139         }
140      }
141      throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find the end of the field name.");
142   }
143
144   @Override
145   protected String parseString(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
146      r.mark();
147      int qc = r.read();
148      final boolean isQuoted = (qc == '\'' || qc == '"');
149      String s = null;
150      boolean isInEscape = false;
151      int c = 0;
152      while (c != -1) {
153         c = r.read();
154         if (isInEscape) {
155            // @formatter:off
156            switch (c) {
157               case 'n': r.replace('\n'); break;
158               case 'r': r.replace('\r'); break;
159               case 't': r.replace('\t'); break;
160               case 'f': r.replace('\f'); break;
161               case 'b': r.replace('\b'); break;
162               case '\\': r.replace('\\'); break;
163               case '/': r.replace('/'); break;
164               case '\'': r.replace('\''); break;
165               case '"': r.replace('"'); break;
166               case 'u': {
167                  String n = r.read(4);
168                  try {
169                     r.replace(Integer.parseInt(n, 16), 6);
170                  } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
171                     throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid Unicode escape sequence in string.");
172                  }
173                  break;
174               }
175               default:
176                  throw new ParseException(this, "Invalid escape sequence in string.");
177            }
178            // @formatter:on
179            isInEscape = false;
180         } else {
181            if (c == '\\') {
182               isInEscape = true;
183               r.delete();
184            } else if (isQuoted) {
185               if (c == qc) {
186                  s = r.getMarked(1, -1);
187                  break;
188               }
189            } else {
190               if (c == ',' || c == '}' || c == ']' || isWhitespace(c) || c == -1) {
191                  s = r.getMarked(0, c == -1 ? 0 : -1);
192                  if (c != -1)
193                     r.unread();
194                  break;
195               }
196            }
197         }
198      }
199      if (s == null)
200         throw new ParseException(this, "Could not find expected end character ''{0}''.", (char)qc);
201
202      skipCommentsAndSpace(r);
203      if (r.peek() == '+') {
204         @SuppressWarnings({
205            "unused" // Intentionally unused; variable/parameter is required by the interface contract
206         })
207         int ignored = r.read();
208         skipCommentsAndSpace(r);
209         s += parseString(r);
210      }
211      return trim(s);
212   }
213
214   @Override
215   protected Number parseNumber(ParserReader r, String s, Class<? extends Number> type) throws ParseException {
216      return StringUtils.parseNumber(s, type);
217   }
218
219   @Override
220   protected void skipCommentsAndSpace(ParserReader r) throws IOException, ParseException {
221      int c = 0;
222      while ((c = r.read()) != -1) {
223         if (! isWhitespace(c)) {
224            if (c == '/') {
225               skipComments(r);
226            } else {
227               r.unread();
228               return;
229            }
230         }
231      }
232   }
233
234   @Override
235   protected boolean isCommentOrWhitespace(int cp) {
236      if (cp == '/')
237         return true;
238      return Character.isWhitespace(cp);
239   }
240
241   @Override
242   protected boolean isWhitespace(int cp) {
243      return Character.isWhitespace(cp);
244   }
245
246   @Override
247   protected void onEmptyInput() {
248      // JSON5 allows empty input, returning null.
249   }
250
251   @Override
252   protected void onMissingValue() {
253      // JSON5 allows missing values, returning null.
254   }
255
256   @Override
257   protected boolean canCoerceNonStringToString() {
258      return true;
259   }
260
261   @SuppressWarnings({
262      "java:S6466" // False positive: new Json5Map(this) resolves to Json5Map(MarshallingSession), not Json5Map(Object...), since Json5ParserSession IS-A MarshallingSession.
263   })
264   @Override /* Overridden from JsonParserSession */
265   protected MarshalledMap newGenericMap() {
266      return new Json5Map(this);
267   }
268
269   @Override /* Overridden from JsonParserSession */
270   protected MarshalledList newGenericList() {
271      return new Json5List(this);
272   }
273}
